name: Mushroom & Sweet Pepper Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 and a half cups Sliced mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium-sized skillet and sauté vegetables and garlic until limp.
2. In a large bowl, crumble or mash the tofu. Add the sautéed vegetables, nutritional yeast, and salt.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Spread the tofu mixture evenly into a 9½-inch or 10-inch quiche pan.
5. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes until the edges start to brown. Garnish with tomatoes.
Vegetarian Times, March, 1992
